hero.title: Premium Starter
hero.subtitle: Ship a polished, monetized React Native app — theme, i18n, paywall, ads, and push notifications already wired.

theme.label: Theme system
theme.desc: Light & dark mode with NativeWind tokens and design-system components.

i18n.label: Internationalization
i18n.desc: 20 languages, RTL support, and lazy-loaded translation files.

paywall.label: Paywall & subscriptions
paywall.desc: RevenueCat integration with a 7-day free trial and premium gating.

ads.label: Ads (AdMob)
ads.desc: Banners, interstitials, and rewarded ads — disabled for premium users.

notifications.label: Push notifications
notifications.desc: FCM setup with foreground banners and background tap handlers.

demoAction.label: Perform a sample action
demoAction.sub: Each action increments the engagement counter that drives the contextual paywall and rating prompt.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize appearance and preferences
settings.clearCacheConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all cached data?
settings.resetFavoritesConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all favorites?
settings.premiumDescription: Remove ads · Premium features · Priority support
settings.adNotAvailableMessage: No ad available right now. Please try again later.
settings.adRewardMessage: You have {{duration}} of ad-free experience. Enjoy!
settings.adErrorMessage: Failed to load ad. Please try again later.

welcome.subtitle: Everything you need, beautifully built and ready to ship.

exitIntent.title: Hold on — try Pro free
exitIntent.body:
7 days free, no charge today.
Cancel in 1 tap, anytime.

proWelcome.title: Welcome back!
proWelcome.body: We found your Pro subscription — it's already active on this device.

initialization.loadingSubtitle: Setting things up, just a moment…
initialization.errorMessage: We need an internet connection to finish setting up. Please check your connection and try again.

error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.apiError: Could not load data. Please try again.
error.rateLimitExceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
error.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

appRating.title: Enjoying RN Starter?
appRating.message: A 5-star rating helps us keep the app free and always improving.
appRating.settingsMessage: Your rating helps us keep the app free and improving. If you enjoy it, we'd love a 5-star review!

rtlRestart.title: Layout update required
rtlRestart.message: Restarting in {{count}}s to apply the new layout.

paywall.title: RN Starter Pro
paywall.subtitle: Unlock every feature
paywall.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

subscription.graceBannerMessage: Connect to internet before {{date}} to verify your subscription.
